# Colchis Creamery
> Authentic Georgian artisanal cheese, handcrafted in Columbus, Ohio with premium local milk.

## About
Colchis Creamery brings the 8,000-year-old Georgian cheesemaking tradition to America. We produce authentic Sulguni, Imeretian, aged reserve, and smoked cheeses using traditional methods and premium Ohio milk.

## Products
- Premium Sulguni — Stretchy, brined cheese perfect for khachapuri
- Imeretian Cheese — Soft, fresh table cheese with mild flavor
- Aged Reserve — Cave-aged artisanal cheese with complex flavor
- Smoked Varieties — Naturally smoked using traditional methods

## Recipes & Pairings
Georgian recipes and cheese pairings using our artisan products, including traditional khachapuri, cheese boards, and modern fusion dishes.

## Journal
Stories, heritage articles, and insights from the world of Georgian cheesemaking and artisanal dairy.

## Wholesale
B2B partnerships available for restaurants, specialty stores, and distributors across the United States.

## Contact
- Website: https://colchiscreamery.com
- Email: hello@colchiscreamery.com
- Location: Columbus, Ohio, USA
